description: Product Description Thoughtful Birthday Gifts Designed for children aged 1th to 18 th, this age-specific crown birthday badge with a sturdy 59mm pin on the reverse is both beautiful and practical, ideal for birthday theme parties and cross-dressing events Birthday Decorations Use our birthday badge to make a must-have for every birthday girl looking to make her birthday memorable, perfect for party favors, group photos and keepsakes Birthday Girl Badge Our birthday badge, it's a gift for your little one's special day, this beautifully designed badge features a glittering crown and eye-catching age indication, making it a delightful accessory for any birthday celebration
